name: INTERFACE INC
business: Interface, Inc. is a global flooring solutions company offering an integrated portfolio of flooring products, including carpet tile, luxury vinyl tile (LVT), nora rubber flooring, and FLOR premium area rugs. The company primarily focuses on corporate office, education, healthcare, government, hospitality, and residential living market segments.

exposures.sentence: In November 2022, we discovered a cybersecurity attack, perpetrated by unauthorized third parties, affecting our IT systems (the Cyber Event).
The increase was primarily due to an increase in capital expenditures attributable to a greater capital investment in manufacturing automation and robotics solutions in 2025.

catalysts.event: Unveiled first-of-its-kind carbon negative nora rubber flooring prototype
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, the Company unveiled the first of a kind carbon negative nora rubber flooring prototype, which has a carbon negative footprint when measured cradle to gate.

catalysts.event: Entered into third amended and restated Syndicated Credit Facility and redeemed Senior Notes
catalysts.sentence: On December 3, 2025, the Company entered into the third amended and restated Facility agreement.
On December 3, 2025, the Company redeemed all of its $300 million outstanding principal amount of 5.50% Senior Notes.
